issues.detail: The skill does not fully cover error scenarios and edge cases, limiting robustness.
Installation script fetched via curl and piped to bash without checksum verification.

scenarios.name: Django app with native deps via nixpacks.toml
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses nixpacks.toml with [phases.setup] nixPkgs for postgresql, pythonVersion pin, and collectstatic in [phases.build] exactly as documented; baseline writes a generic Dockerfile and never invokes nixpacks.

scenarios.name: GitHub Actions build/push with Nixpacks
scenarios.rationale: Treatment installs nixpacks via the documented curl install, uses nixpacks build with --name and --env per the SKILL.md workflow, and pushes to GHCR; baseline uses docker/build-push-action and a hand-written Dockerfile.
